title: salix angstroemiana
intro: Salix angstroemiana, also known as Angstroemia willow, is a species of willow tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Salix angstroemiana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal use.
